title: tragopogon pratensis subsp. dubius
intro: Tragopogon pratensis subsp. dubius, also known as Salsify or Goatsbeard, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its yellow flowers and edible roots. The medicinal properties of Salsify include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of consuming Salsify include supporting digestive health, reducing inflammation, and acting as a natural diuretic. Salsify can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as dried root, tea, and tincture, which can be used to make medicinal infusions and tonics.
